title: How to create a formula to divide a constant number in the number of tasks?
excerpt:
Hi Guys 
which formula do I need do divide the number 90 which represent the total hours in a Sprint by the number of tasks in the sprint? 
Ex: if I have 10 items in a sprint the result will be 9 per item

posts.author: mirmelsh (Roi Mirmelshtein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys

which formula do I need do divide the number 90 which represent the total hours in a Sprint by the number of tasks in the sprint?
Ex: if I have 10 items in a sprint the result will be 9 per item

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @mirmelsh - are your tasks in a sprint represented as items or subitems?

posts.author: mirmelsh (Roi Mirmelshtein)
posts.cookedHtml: hi @mark.anley they are set as items
